subtitle: Manage vessel calls (trips): one shipment plan groups multiple shipping instructions.
createSiSectionHint: Add one or more draft shipping instructions for this vessel call. Purpose, ETA, and voyage come from the plan above.
createPlanOnlySuccess: Shipment plan created. Assign jetty on Allocation & Berthing, then add shipping instructions when ready.
createNeedAtLeastOneSi: Add at least one shipping instruction before saving.
createPlanSavedSiFailed: Plan {{planRef}} was created, but SI {{n}} failed: {{message}}. Add the remaining SIs from the plan hub.
createPlanAndSisSuccess: Shipment plan created with {{count}} shipping instruction(s).
formTotalCargoMtInfoTooltip: Auto Calculated from Commodity Qty in Shipping Instructions
formTotalCargoMtHint: Sum of MT quantities from shipping instruction breakdown below. Used for DWT calculation.
formTotalCargoMtPending: Add cargo qty (MT) in Shipping instructions below to compute DWT.
formTotalCargoMtKlNote: Only MT quantities count toward DWT; KL cargo is not included.
formTotalCargoMtMultiSiHint: Sum of MT across all shipping instructions on this plan.
formVesselDwtInfoTooltip: Auto Calculated, formula : GT + Total Cargo
formVesselDwtHint: Calculated automatically: Vessel Gross Tonnage (GT) + total cargo qty (MT) from shipping instruction breakdown.
formVesselNumberFieldInvalid: {{field}} is required and must be a number greater than 0.
jettySuggestionLabel: Suggested jetties for this vessel & ETA: {{list}}
jettyNoSuggestion: No jetty fits this vessel (LOA / DWT) at the entered ETA.
jettyReasonLoa: LOA {{loa}} m exceeds jetty length {{len}} m
formJettyUnsuitable: Jetty {{jetty}} does not fit this vessel: {{reason}}. Choose a suggested jetty or adjust vessel details.
vesselInfoReadOnly: You have view-only access. Ask a shipment-plan editor to change vessel information.
formEtaRequired: ETA is required for the shipment plan.
formPurposeRequired: Select a purpose for this vessel call.
planCreatedAddSi: Plan saved. Add the first shipping instruction (you can add more later from the plan hub).
planSavedEnterSiInModal: Plan saved. Complete the shipping instruction below.
planAndFirstSiSaved: Shipment plan and first shipping instruction saved.
hubExtraSiHint: To add another shipping instruction on this vessel call, use “Add shipping instruction” again. Purpose, ETA, and voyage follow the shipment plan for every SI on this plan.
siExtractSuccess: Document read — suggested values applied to empty fields. Please review.
siExtractSuccessWithCount: {{count}} field group(s) detected from the document — please review.
siExtractSparse: Document was processed but no SI fields could be detected. Try PNG/JPEG or a PDF with selectable text.
siExtractFailed: Could not read this document for auto-fill.
siExtractLookupsMissing: Form catalogs are still loading. Wait a moment and upload the document again.
siExtractConflictHint: Some fields already have values. Choose whether to keep your current data or use the values read from the document.
siExtractConflictPartialHint: Other fields were filled automatically from the document. Resolve the conflicts below to finish.
siExtractDropdownWarnings: ({{count}} dropdown value(s) could not be matched — please review.)
siExtractPanelSummaryWarning: {{count}} field(s) applied from "{{fileName}}" — {{warningCount}} dropdown value(s) need review
siExtractPanelAppliedEmpty: No empty fields were filled automatically.
siExtractPanelUnmatchedEmpty: All dropdown values matched system options.
siExtractPanelNotDetectedEmpty: All tracked fields had some text detected in the document.
siExtractConflictWarningsHint: These values were read from the document but are not in the system catalog. Review after resolving field conflicts below.
deletePlanConfirm: Delete {{label}} and all draft shipping instructions on this plan? This cannot be undone.
editPlanSiListEmpty: No shipping instructions on this plan yet.
editAddNewSisHint: Save the plan above, then add one or more new draft SIs. Vessel, jetty, purpose, ETA, and voyage follow the plan.
editPlanSavedWithNewSis: Plan updated and {{count}} new shipping instruction(s) created.
editPlanSavedUpdatedSis: Plan updated and {{count}} shipping instruction(s) saved.
editPlanSavedUpdatedAndCreated: Plan updated, {{updated}} SI(s) saved and {{created}} new SI(s) created.
certifyLabel: I certify that I have reviewed this shipment plan and linked shipping instructions.
approvalReasonPlaceholder: Required for both approve and reject.
noPermission: You do not have permission to perform this action.
